Serving NW Calgary since 1975

Hot Pizza. Cold Beer. Every Game.

Where cold beer meets hot pizza — and the game’s always on. Family recipe, 51 years deep, 30+ TVs lit up every night in Thorncliffe.

Call to Order — (403) 275-2722 View Delivery Areas
🍕

Legendary Pizzas

Hand-tossed, fresh-made daily from a family recipe untouched since 1979. Premium toppings, real mozzarella, in-house sauce.

📺

Every Game, Every Night

30+ TVs showing NHL, CFL, NFL, MLB, UFC, NBA. From Flames home games to UFC pay-per-views, you won’t miss a snap.

🍺

Full Bar & Pub Eats

Cold beer, cocktails, highballs on special. Wings (50 flavours), burgers, pastas, classics. Pool table, jukebox, VLTs in the lounge.

Pizzas Named For The Neighborhoods We Feed

After 51 years in NW Calgary, the neighborhoods became part of the menu. Three of our most-ordered:

The Thorncliffe

Meat sauce, Pepperoni, Mushrooms, Green peppers, Ham, Olives, Feta

Inspired by Thorncliffe

The Huntington

Feta, Cheddar cheese, Tomatoes, Banana peppers, Sausage

Inspired by Huntington Hills

The Beddington

Pepperoni, Beef, Ham, Green peppers, Tomatoes, Shrimp

Inspired by Beddington Heights

The Recipe Hasn’t Changed Since 1975

Jim grew up surrounded by traditional Greek cooking. Armed with a dough recipe passed down from the old country, he and his wife Kristina immigrated to Canada and built TOPS Pizza & Sports Bar from the ground up. Their son Peter now plays an active role in carrying the family legacy forward.

Today, every pizza that leaves our oven is made by hand, from scratch — with a dough recipe Jim Tsoulamanis brought from Greece, the same in-house sauce, real Alberta-made mozzarella, and the same standard 51 years on.

Read the TOPS story →

What Our Calgary Neighbors Say

⭐ 4.3 / 5 across 209+ reviews

David S. · Google

"The meat lovers was excellent. Crust crisp yet light, a good amount of meat and toppings."

Terri W. · Google

"Friendly environment, cheerful staff. Good food and drinks, reasonable prices."

Will C. · Google

"Dining room, lounge, pool, jukebox, VLTs, sports TVs everywhere, 31 flavours of wings."
